query: SELECT id, realmId, SUBSTRING(refreshToken, 1, 30) as refreshToken_prefix, expiresAt, createdAt, updatedAt FROM qb_settings ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4xeK7FVQkXBtxe6.root --database 45yCshMdhCKkPUhGJzLrcU --execute SELECT id, realmId, SUBSTRING(refreshToken, 1, 30) as refreshToken_prefix, expiresAt, createdAt, updatedAt FROM qb_settings ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 1;
